title: Rule
description: Rule schema from Amazon EventBridge API

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the rule.

EventPattern.description: The event pattern of the rule.

ScheduleExpression.description: The scheduling expression (e.g., cron or rate expression).

RoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role.

EventBusName.description: The name or ARN of the event bus associated with the rule.
